[0m[0m[1m[33mID:       [0m RUSTSEC-2026-0097

Diff in /home/runner/work/p2p_app/p2p_app/tests/logging.rs:38:
 fn test_push_log_appears_in_get_tui_logs() {
     p2p_app::logging::init_logging();
     p2p_app::logging::clear_tui_logs();
-    let unique = format!("unique-marker-{}", std::time::SystemTime::now()
-        .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH).unwrap().as_nanos());
+    let unique = format!(
+        "unique-marker-{}",
+        std::time::SystemTime::now()
+            .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH)
+            .unwrap()
+            .as_nanos()
+    );
     p2p_app::logging::push_log(unique.clone());
     let logs = p2p_app::logging::get_tui_logs();
-    assert!(logs.iter().any(|l| l.contains(&unique)),
-        "pushed log should appear in get_tui_logs, got: {:?}", logs);
+    assert!(
+        logs.iter().any(|l| l.contains(&unique)),
+        "pushed log should appear in get_tui_logs, got: {:?}",
+        logs
+    );
 }
 
 #[serial]
Diff in /home/runner/work/p2p_app/p2p_app/tests/logging.rs:53:
     p2p_app::logging::push_log("to-be-cleared");
     p2p_app::logging::clear_tui_logs();

-    assert!(logs.is_empty(), "logs should be empty after clear, got: {:?}", logs);
+    assert!(
+        logs.is_empty(),
+        "logs should be empty after clear, got: {:?}",
+        logs
+    );
 }

     assert_eq!(size, p2p_app::network::NetworkSize::Medium);
 }

 #[tokio::test]
 async fn test_create_channels_can_send_receive() {
-    let (event_tx, mut event_rx, _input_tx, _input_rx) =
-        p2p_app::tui_events::create_channels();
-    event_tx.send(p2p_app::tui_events::TuiEvent::Exit).await.unwrap();
+    let (event_tx, mut event_rx, _input_tx, _input_rx) = p2p_app::tui_events::create_channels();
+    event_tx
+        .send(p2p_app::tui_events::TuiEvent::Exit)
+        .await
+        .unwrap();
     let msg = event_rx.recv().await.unwrap();
     assert!(matches!(msg, p2p_app::tui_events::TuiEvent::Exit));
 }
Diff in /home/runner/work/p2p_app/p2p_app/tests/tui_events.rs:170:
 
 #[tokio::test]
 async fn test_create_channels_input_roundtrip() {
-    let (_event_tx, _event_rx, input_tx, mut input_rx) =
-        p2p_app::tui_events::create_channels();
-    input_tx.send(p2p_app::tui_events::InputCommand::ScrollUp).await.unwrap();
+    let (_event_tx, _event_rx, input_tx, mut input_rx) = p2p_app::tui_events::create_channels();
+    input_tx
+        .send(p2p_app::tui_events::InputCommand::ScrollUp)
+        .await
+        .unwrap();
     let cmd = input_rx.recv().await.unwrap();
     assert!(matches!(cmd, p2p_app::tui_events::InputCommand::ScrollUp));
 }

     assert_eq!(get_command_arg(&parsed), Some("alice"));

[1m[91merror[E0308][0m[1m: mismatched types[0m
   [1m[94m--> [0mtests/tui_helpers.rs:599:33
    [1m[94m|[0m
[1m[94m599[0m [1m[94m|[0m     assert_eq!(get_command_name(&parsed), Some("nick"));
    [1m[94m|[0m                [1m[94m----------------[0m [1m[91m^^^^^^^[0m [1m[91mexpected `&str`, found `&Option<(&str, &str)>`[0m
    [1m[94m|[0m                [1m[94m|[0m
